subsection.heading: Federal Charter.—
subsection.content: The National Recording Preservation Foundation (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

subsection.heading: Nature of Corporation.—
subsection.content: The corporation is a charitable and nonprofit corporation and is not an agency or establishment of the United States Government.

subsection.heading: Perpetual Existence.—
subsection.content: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
